name: L-Shape Sofa
description: Luxury L-Shape sectional sofa offering ultimate comfort and sleek styling. Perfect for large families and hosting guests.

name: Leather Sofa
description: Premium genuine leather upholstery with a classic tufted design. Gives a royal and polished feel to any living room setup.

name: Fabric Sofa
description: Minimalist fabric sofa featuring high density foam cushions and durable linen covers. Perfect for compact and modern apartments.

name: Wooden Sofa
description: Traditional solid sheesham wood sofa set with thick plush cushions. High structural strength and longevity.

name: Modern Sofa
description: Sleek contemporary design with thin chrome legs and adjustable headrests. Adds a touch of high-tech luxury.

name: Dining Table
description: Solid wood dining table built to host memories. Accommodates 4-6 chairs comfortably for pleasant meal times.

name: Coffee Table
description: Chic central table for living rooms with nested shelving below for storing magazines and remote controls.

name: Study Table
description: Ergonomic work-from-home desk with integrated cable trays and dual drawers to help you stay productive.

name: Side Table
description: Compact bedside table to hold your reading lamps, smartphones, and decorative vases elegantly.

name: Office Table
description: Executive style office desk with lockable cabinet compartments, heavy keyboard slider, and wire grommets.

name: Cotton Curtain
description: Breathable 100% natural cotton curtains. Diffuses daylight beautifully while maintaining your privacy.

name: Silk Curtain
description: Luxury silk drapes with soft lining. Adds a glossy, sophisticated texture and shimmers elegantly in ambient lighting.

name: Blackout Curtain
description: Thick triple-woven thermal insulated blackout drapes blocking 99% of sunlight. Ideal for home theaters and bedrooms.

name: Net Curtain
description: Sheer net curtains with delicate lace embroidery patterns. Allows fresh air flow and gives a dreamy backdrop.

name: Designer Curtain
description: Custom geometric printed heavy drapes matching premium modern room setups. Fade-resistant color technology.

name: Orthopedic Mattress
description: Doctor-recommended orthopedic memory foam mattress. Relieves joint pain and offers perfect spinal alignment support.

name: Memory Foam
description: Body-adaptive memory foam mattress absorbing pressure points. Includes luxury breathable outer zipper cover.

name: Spring Mattress
description: Pocket spring mattress with quilted foam topping. Provides superior bounce, motion isolation, and cool airflow.

name: Coir Mattress
description: Natural rubberized coconut coir mattress. Highly breathable, firm support, eco-friendly cooling properties.

name: Luxury Pillow-Top
description: Super premium hotel comfort double sided pillow-top mattress. Zero partner disturbance technology.

specifications.Material: Latex Foam & Luxury Gel Pocket Springs

description: Massive solid teak wood 6-seater dining set with highly padded chairs. Perfect for grand dinners and family celebrations.

description: Tempered glass-top dining table with sleek powder-coated metal legs. Set includes 4 comfortable leatherette chairs.

name: Wooden Dining Set
description: Cozy 4-seater dining set made of premium sheesham wood. Classic design suitable for modern dining rooms.

description: Space saving drop-leaf dining set with 2 foldable stools. Excellent option for studio apartments and balconies.

description: Scandinavian style dining table with 4 pastel colored chairs. Elegant design featuring light ashwood finishing.

name: Table Lamp
description: Bedroom reading lamp with a woven fabric shade. Creates a soft, relaxed ambient glow in dark rooms.

name: Floor Lamp
description: Tall arched floor lamp to position over reading armchairs or sofas. Heavy base prevents accidental tipping.

name: Wall Lamp
description: Industrial rustic style wall-mounted swing-arm sconce lamp. Hardwire or plug-in flexibility.

name: Designer Lamp
description: Handcrafted mosaic stained-glass table lamp. Shows breathtaking patterns on adjacent walls when switched on.

name: Memory Foam Pillow
description: Contoured cervical support memory foam pillow. Adapts to neck curves and stops snoring and soreness.

description: Cool-gel infused orthopedic pillow. Diffuses heat and provides optimal cooling during deep sleep.

name: Soft Cotton Pillow
description: Fluffy standard sleeping pillows packed with premium microfiber fillings. Soft and machine washable.

name: Decorative Pillow
description: Stylish hand-knit throw pillows for couches and lounges. Easily removable zip closures for cleaning.

name: Neck Support Pillow
description: Travel neck pillow made of memory foam. Perfect companion for flights, roadtrips, and office rests.

name: U-Shape Kitchen
description: Spacious U-Shape kitchen providing high work-triangle efficiency. Built-in microwave and oven tall unit included.

name: Straight Kitchen
description: Ergonomic straight kitchen design ideal for compact homes. Fits chimney, sink, and cooktop lines seamlessly.

name: Island Kitchen
description: Grand modular kitchen layout with an independent central breakfast island counter and built-in chimney hob.

name: Parallel Kitchen
description: Dual platform parallel modular kitchen. Segregates washing zone and cooking zone effectively to keep counters dry.
